text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As part of her self-promotion efforts, Curren
Chan decides to do an interview for a website.
She seems to have some prior experience with the
reporter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The interview starts with a barrage of impolite
questions seemingly aimed at making her confess
that she's only racing for the attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Curren Chan flat out denies the
accusation that she's just messing around. She
also speaks seriously about her feelings toward
racing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, she captivates the interviewer and
makes him admit she is cute. When the article is
posted a few days later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan's feelings resonate with everyone,
and she is successful in changing the minds of
many who thought she wasn't taking running
seriously.
